since_last: 43% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.25%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC -1.19% · Gold +0.74% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 43% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.25%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.25%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.05%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.05%, ANET +8.76%, SMCI +7.31%, BIDU +4.93%, AVGO +4.83%. Laggards: PANW -4.88%, WDAY -4.02%, ZS -3.98%, UPST -3.78%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.78% at $148.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: BABA moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: BABA is +11.05% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
